name: Imgcompress
tagline: Offline image compression, conversion, and AI background removal for Docker homelabs.
description:
Offline image compression, conversion, and AI background removal for Docker homelabs.

Docs: https://imgcompress.karimzouine.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  imgcompress:
    image: karimz1/imgcompress:0.6.0
    environment:
      - DISABLE_LOGO=${DISABLE_LOGO:-false}
      - DISABLE_STORAGE_MANAGEMENT=${DISABLE_STORAGE_MANAGEMENT:-false}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:5000
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42052:5000
